title: canthium elmeri
intro: Canthium elmeri, also known as the Elmer's canthium or Elmer's wild sesame, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. The plant is widely used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of Canthium elmeri include the treatment of various ailments such as fever, cough, and skin conditions, as well as its use as a remedy for wounds and infections. In herbal preparations, Canthium elmeri is typically used in the form of a decoction or infusion, with the leaves and roots being harvested and dried for use in teas, tinctures, and topical applications.
